fixes.description: The *:focus-visible rule in body.css was declared outside any @layer, giving it higher cascade priority than Tailwind's @layer utilities. This meant focus-visible:outline-solid and focus-visible:outline-white on header elements could not override the global outline-dotted outline-black default.
fixes.change: Wrapped the *:focus-visible rule in @layer base so that Tailwind utility classes (which live in @layer utilities) can correctly override the base default when explicitly set on an element.
fixes.impact: Site-wide: the focus-visible default still applies to all elements unchanged. The only behavioural difference is that Tailwind utility classes (focus-visible:outline-solid, focus-visible:outline-white, etc.) now correctly override the base rule as intended by the cascade layer spec.
